falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 drops by 5% from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Continued downward momentum would contradict the pattern's implication of a potential bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff pressure would indicate a different market dynamic, refuting the current HOLD and UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX index spikes above 30 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would suggest market panic, contradicting the stability expected around a bottom pattern and invalidating the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
